memberdef.name: XML_PAT_COPY_NSNAME

briefdescription.para: Free the compiled pattern for streaming.
Create a new XSLT Pattern.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated xmlPattern or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free up the memory allocated by comp
Free up the memory allocated by all the elements of comp
Create a new XML pattern parser context.

parameterdescription.para: the prefix definitions, array of [URI, prefix] terminated with [NULL, NULL] or NULL if no namespace is used

simplesect.para: the newly allocated xmlPatParserContext or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free up the memory allocated by ctxt

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlPatParserContextPtr ctxt, xmlPatternPtr comp, xmlPatOp op, xmlChar *value, xmlChar *value2)
memberdef.name: xmlPatternAdd

briefdescription.para: Add a step to an XSLT Compiled Match.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of failure, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: reverse all the stack of expressions

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Test whether the node matches the pattern.

simplesect.para: 1 if it matches, 0 if it doesn't and -1 in case of failure

briefdescription.para: [4] NameChar ::= Letter | Digit | '.

simplesect.para: the Name parsed or NULL

briefdescription.para: Parses a non qualified name.

simplesect.para: the Name parsed or NULL

briefdescription.para: Compile an attribute test.
Compile the Step Pattern and generates a precompiled form suitable for fast matching.
Compile the Path Pattern and generates a precompiled form suitable for fast matching.
Compile the Path Pattern and generates a precompiled form suitable for fast matching.
build a new compiled pattern for streaming

simplesect.para: the new structure or NULL in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlStreamCompPtr comp, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *ns, int nodeType, int flags)
memberdef.name: xmlStreamCompAddStep

briefdescription.para: Add a new step to the compiled pattern.

parameterdescription.para: the first string, the name, or NULL for *
the second step, the namespace name

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error or the step index if successful

briefdescription.para: Tries to stream compile a pattern.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of failure and 0 in case of success.

briefdescription.para: build a new stream context

simplesect.para: the new structure or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Free the stream context.
Add a new state to the stream context.

parameterdescription.para: the step index for that streaming state

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error or the state index if successful

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlStreamCtxtPtr stream, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *ns, int nodeType)
memberdef.name: xmlStreamPushInternal

briefdescription.para: Push new data onto the stream.

detaileddescription.para: NOTE: if the call xmlPatterncompile indicated a dictionary, then strings for name and ns will be expected to come from the dictionary. Both name and ns being NULL means the / i.e. the root of the document. This can also act as a reset.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 1 if the current state in the stream is a match and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Push new data onto the stream.

detaileddescription.para: NOTE: if the call xmlPatterncompile indicated a dictionary, then strings for name and ns will be expected to come from the dictionary. Both name and ns being NULL means the / i.e. the root of the document. This can also act as a reset. Otherwise the function will act as if it has been given an element-node.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 1 if the current state in the stream is a match and 0 otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlStreamCtxt *stream, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *ns, int nodeType)
memberdef.name: xmlStreamPushNode

briefdescription.para: Push new data onto the stream.

detaileddescription.para: NOTE: if the call xmlPatterncompile indicated a dictionary, then strings for name and ns will be expected to come from the dictionary. Both name and ns being NULL means the / i.e. the root of the document. This can also act as a reset. Different from xmlStreamPush this function can be fed with nodes of type: element-, attribute-, text-, cdata-section-, comment- and processing-instruction-node.

parameterdescription.para: the type of the node being pushed

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 1 if the current state in the stream is a match and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Push new attribute data onto the stream.

detaileddescription.para: NOTE: If the call to xmlPatterncompile indicated a dictionary, then strings for name and ns will be expected to come from the dictionary.
Both name and ns being NULL means the root of the document. This can also act as a reset. Otherwise the function will act as if it has been given an attribute-node.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 1 if the current state in the stream is a match and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: push one level from the stream.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Query if the streaming pattern additionally needs to be fed with text-, cdata-section-, comment- and processing-instruction-nodes.

detaileddescription.para: If the result is 0 then only element-nodes and attribute-nodes need to be pushed.

simplesect.para: 1 in case of need of nodes of the above described types, 0 otherwise. -1 on API errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (const xmlChar *pattern, xmlDict *dict, int flags, const xmlChar **namespaces, xmlPattern **patternOut)
memberdef.name: xmlPatternCompileSafe

briefdescription.para: Compile a pattern.

parameterdescription.para: an optional dictionary for interned strings
the prefix definitions, array of [URI, prefix] or NULL

simplesect.para: 0 on success, 1 on error, -1 if a memory allocation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const xmlChar *pattern, xmlDict *dict, int flags, const xmlChar **namespaces)
memberdef.name: xmlPatterncompile

briefdescription.para: Compile a pattern.

parameterdescription.para: an optional dictionary for interned strings
the prefix definitions, array of [URI, prefix] or NULL

simplesect.para: the compiled form of the pattern or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Test whether the node matches the pattern.

simplesect.para: 1 if it matches, 0 if it doesn't and -1 in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Get a streaming context for that pattern Use xmlFreeStreamCtxt to free the context.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the context or NULL in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Check if the pattern is streamable i.e.

simplesect.para: 1 if streamable, 0 if not and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Check the maximum depth reachable by a pattern.

simplesect.para: -2 if no limit (using //), otherwise the depth, and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Check the minimum depth reachable by a pattern, 0 mean the / or .

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error otherwise the depth,

briefdescription.para: Check if the pattern must be looked at from the root.

simplesect.para: 1 if true, 0 if false and -1 in case of error
